backtest_result_summary: 4B overlays averaged ~0.91 full-window proximity; price-only blowoff worked as watch but should not be hard sell without non-price risk.
hypothesis: 4B should require full-window and local proximity split plus non-price evidence where available.
next_validation_needed: Find cases with non-price overhang/CB/lock-up evidence.
